LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT GEORGE PADGETT'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING: OVERRULED, TEN DAYS TO ANSWER. ALTHOUGH THE COURT MAY TAKE JUDICIAL NOTICE OF THE FACT THAT THE PARTIES SETTLED THE UNLAWFUL DETAINER ACTION, THE CONTENTS OF THE SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT ARE HEARSAY AND THE COURT MAY NOT TAKE JUDICIAL NOTICE OF THE TRUTH OF THE TERMS. KILROY V STATE (2004) 119 CAL APP 4TH 140, 145. TO THE EXTENT DEFENDANTS SEEK TO ENFORCE THE TERMS OF THE SETTLEMENT, THERE ARE WAYS TO DO THAT APART FROM A DEMURRER. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR #8600
ORDER OVERRULING (DEFENDANT GEORGE PADGETT'S) DEMURRER (TO COMPLAINT)
